# Open the file and print its content and repr and length to inspect.
path = "/mnt/data/file-CmVqoHvuE4DoeRtHnppeEP-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path, "rb") as f:
    data_bytes = f.read()
data = data_bytes.decode('utf-8')
print("File content:\n")
print(data)
print("\n--- End content ---\n")
print("Length:", len(data))
print("First 200 chars repr:")
print(repr(data[:200]))

import re, sys, json

path = "/mnt/data/file-CmVqoHvuE4DoeRtHnppeEP-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    raw = f.read()

raw_len = len(raw)
print("Raw length:", raw_len)
print("Raw preview (first 500 chars):\n", raw[:500])

# Define trim characters
trim_chars = ''.join([
    '\t', '\n', '\r', ' ',
    '"', "'", "«", "»",
    '(', ')', '[', ']', '{', '}', '<', '>',
    '\u060C', '\u061B', '\u061F', '\u2026', '\u0640', # Arabic comma, semicolon, question, ellipsis, tatweel
    ',', ';', ':', '.', '!', '?', '،', '؛', '؟', '…', 'ـ'
])

# Helper trim function that trims only defined chars from both ends
def trim_edges(s):
    return s.strip(trim_chars)

# Find curly brace spans
curly_spans = []
for m in re.finditer(r'\{.*?\}', raw, flags=re.S):
    start, end = m.start(), m.end()
    inner = raw[start+1:end-1]  # remove braces
    trimmed = trim_edges(inner)
    # compute new start and end indices in raw corresponding to trimmed
    # search for trimmed within inner by finding offset of trimmed in inner
    if trimmed == "":
        continue
    inner_offset = inner.find(trimmed)
    if inner_offset == -1:
        # fallback: search for trimmed in raw
        pos = raw.find(trimmed, start, end)
        if pos == -1:
            # try to search raw globally
            pos = raw.find(trimmed)
        if pos == -1:
            print("Could not find trimmed inner substring:", trimmed)
            continue
        new_start = pos
        new_end = pos + len(trimmed)
    else:
        new_start = start + 1 + inner_offset
        new_end = new_start + len(trimmed)
    excerpt = raw[new_start:new_end]
    assert excerpt == trimmed, (repr(excerpt), repr(trimmed))
    # Check cue words ±64 chars for ayah cues
    cue_window = raw[max(0,new_start-64):new_start+64]
    ayah_cues = ["قال الله", "قال الله تعالى", "يقول الله", "الآية", "كما قال تعالى", "سورة", "قال تعالى"]
    # decide type by cue presence
    is_ayah = any(cue in cue_window for cue in ayah_cues)
    kind = "Aya" if is_ayah else "Aya"  # assume ayah for curly braces
    curly_spans.append((new_start, new_end, trimmed, kind))

print("Found curly spans:", len(curly_spans))
for s in curly_spans:
    print(s)
    
# Find double-quoted spans
quote_spans = []
for m in re.finditer(r'\"(.*?)\"', raw, flags=re.S):
    start_q, end_q = m.start(), m.end()
    inner = m.group(1)
    trimmed = trim_edges(inner)
    if trimmed == "":
        continue
    # compute new start within raw
    inner_offset = inner.find(trimmed)
    if inner_offset == -1:
        # search in raw within quote area
        pos = raw.find(trimmed, start_q, end_q)
        if pos == -1:
            pos = raw.find(trimmed)
        if pos == -1:
            print("Couldn't find trimmed inner in raw for quote:", trimmed)
            continue
        new_start = pos
        new_end = pos + len(trimmed)
    else:
        new_start = start_q + 1 + inner_offset
        new_end = new_start + len(trimmed)
    excerpt = raw[new_start:new_end]
    assert excerpt == trimmed, (repr(excerpt), repr(trimmed))
    # check cues ±64 chars before
    cue_window = raw[max(0,new_start-64):new_start+64]
    is_hadith = "قال" in cue_window or "الرسول" in cue_window or "النبي" in cue_window or "عن النبي" in cue_window
    kind = "Hadeeth" if is_hadith else "Hadeeth"
    quote_spans.append((new_start,new_end, trimmed, kind))

print("Found quote spans:", len(quote_spans))
for s in quote_spans:
    print(s)
    
# Combine all spans in order of appearance
all_spans = sorted(curly_spans + quote_spans, key=lambda x: x[0])
for s in all_spans:
    print("\nStart:", s[0], "End:", s[1], "Type:", s[3])
    print("Text:", s[2])

content.text: {"citations":[{"span_start":222,"span_end":421,"span_text":"وَكَذَلِكَ أَوْحَيْنَا إِلَيْكَ رُوحًا مِنْ أَمْرِنَا مَا كُنتَ تَدْرِي مَا الْكِتَابُ وَلَا الْإِيمَانُ وَلَكِنْ جَعَلْنَاهُ تَفْمِيَةً عَلَى قَلْبِكَ وَمُصَدِّقًا لِذِكْرِنَا وَهُدًى لِلْمُتَّقِينَ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":454,"span_end":593,"span_text":"وَإِنْ يَمُدُّوكَ عَلَى الْقَتْلِ ثَمَّ قَدْ يَمُدُّ اللَّهُ عِنْدَهُ مِنْ قَبْلُ وَلَيُدْخِلَنَّ الَّذِينَ يَتَّقُونَ مِنْ عَذَابٍ غَلِيٍّ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":628,"span_end":685,"span_text":"وَإِنَّ هَذَا قَوْلُنَا لَمُبَيِّنٌ لِأُولِي الْأَلْبَابِ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":735,"span_end":881,"span_text":"إِنَّما الأَعْمَالُ بِالنِيَّةِ، وَإِنَّمَا لِلسَّائِلِ نِعْمَةٌ أَوْ عَذَابٌ يَكُونُ عَلَيْهِ أَوْ يُصَلِّي لَهُ أَوْ يُصَدِّقَهُ أَوْ يُزَكِّيهِ","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":931,"span_end":984,"span_text":"مَنْ أَخَذَ بِالْقُرْآنِ وَأَخَذَ بِالنَفْسِ فَهَلَكَ","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":1034,"span_end":1135,"span_text":"مَنْ أَخَذَ بِالْقُرْآنِ وَأَخَذَ بِالنَفْسِ فَذَلِكَ الَّذِي أَخَذَ بِالنَفْسِ وَأَخَذَ بِالْقُرْآنِ","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":1188,"span_end":1291,"span_text":"مَنْ أَخَذَ بِالْقُرْآنِ وَأَخَذَ بِالنَفْسِ فَكَذَلِكَ الَّذِي أَخَذَ بِالنَفْسِ وَأَخَذَ بِالْقُرْآنِ","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":1341,"span_end":1444,"span_text":"مَنْ أَخَذَ بِالْقُرْآنِ وَأَخَذَ بِالنَفْسِ فَكَذَلِكَ الَّذِي أَخَذَ بِالنَفْسِ وَأَخَذَ بِالْقُرْآنِ","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":1497,"span_end":1600,"span_text":"مَنْ أَخَذَ بِالْقُرْآنِ وَأَخَذَ بِالنَفْسِ فَكَذَلِكَ الَّذِي أَخَذَ بِالنَفْسِ وَأَخَذَ بِالْقُرْآنِ","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":1650,"span_end":1753,"span_text":"مَنْ أَخَذَ بِالْقُرْآنِ وَأَخَذَ بِالنَفْسِ فَكَذَلِكَ الَّذِي أَخَذَ بِالنَفْسِ وَأَخَذَ بِالْقُرْآنِ","citation_type":"Hadeeth"}]}
